title: Jungle Lust
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jungle Lust''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in the domed city of [[Plett's Well|Plawal]] where the [[Bran Kemple|town boss]] ran card games. It featured a male [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and female [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] dancer, as well as old [[Framjem Spathen]] music [[Hologram/Legends|holos]]. [[Sadie]] was the bartender.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
